notes: Current live whole-unit terraced-house comparables were taken from Mudah listings in/around Taman Yayasan, Buluh Kasap, and nearby Segamat. I excluded room-only/bedspace/partition ads. I also excluded one Taman Yayasan terraced ad priced at RM600 because the page did not explicitly state 1-storey/1.5-storey, to keep the property-type filter strict. No live Segamat-area 1.5-storey terraced listing surfaced in the current search results.
